title: [MTR4] LHB EOG Coaches 1.0 - Indian Railways
description: Adds Indian LHB EOG coaches. Mandatory trainset coaches for Red LHB. Can be combined with other LHB coaches too but not recommended.
body:
⚡ LHB EOG Pack – Indian Railways Generator Coaches
-----------------------------------------------

Complete Indian Railways LHB train formations with the LHB EOG (End-On Generation)
Generator Car resource pack. Designed for realism and seamless integration with
MTR, this pack accurately represents the power coaches used in non-HOG LHB rakes
across India.

---
### ✨ Features:

- Highly detailed LHB EOG generator coach models based on real Indian Railways specifications
- Includes the following coach variants:
  * EOG Generator Car (Forwards direction)
  * EOG Generator Car (Reverse direction)
- Accurate grills, vents, exhaust sections, and roof-mounted equipment
- Realistic Indian Railways markings and detailing
- Proper orientation for correct placement at both ends of an LHB rake
- This resource pack may receive more EOG coaches with different liveries in future updates
  (the forwards + reverse combination will always remain the same)

### ⚠️ Warnings:
--------

- Uses .OBJ models, which may cause lag or stuttering on MTR4. Performance issues related to MTR’s rendering system are beyond our control
- Minor visual or texture alignment issues may exist — updates will refine these
- Designed for Indian Broad Gauge (1676 mm)
- Platforms higher than 1 block may visually clip with underframe elements
- Works only on MTR4 i.e MTR 4.0.0 and above. Not suitable for MTR3

👉 Please report any bugs or visual glitches in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2bGWEmvjvZ) so we can address them in future updates.

### 📦 Requirements:
------------

- **[Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u)** – Base Mod
- **[Indian Railways Resources](https://modrinth.com/project/id8qqQsh)** *(optional but recommended)* – ensures accurate alignment with the locomotive.
- Highly recommended to use together with:
  * [Red LHB Sleeper AC Coaches Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/TByE0bC7) (Mandatory to complete the trainset)
  * [WAP-7 Locomotive Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/aj0bTZQi) (or any other Indian locomotive)

### 🛠️ Installation:
------------

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it inside /.minecraft/resourcepacks/
3. Enable the pack in Minecraft
4. Look for generator coaches starting with “LHB EOG” in the Depot list
